title: Armed forces occupations
description: Military roles that focus on defense, security operations, field logistics, tactical coordination, and command structures.

title: Managers
description: Leaders who direct organizations, business units, operations, budgets, strategy, and teams.

title: Professionals
description: Knowledge workers in fields such as science, engineering, medicine, law, education, and other advanced professional services.

title: Technicians and associate professionals
description: Skilled technical support roles that combine applied knowledge, tools, data, and operational judgment.

title: Clerical support workers
description: Office and administrative workers handling records, documents, forms, scheduling, communication, and routine information processing.

title: Service and sales workers
description: Frontline jobs in retail, hospitality, care, customer service, and personal services that depend on human interaction.

title: Skilled agricultural, forestry and fishery workers
description: Workers engaged in farming, forestry, aquaculture, and related outdoor production tasks in physical environments.

title: Craft and related trades workers
description: Skilled tradespeople performing construction, repair, fabrication, and other hands-on craft work.

title: Plant and machine operators, and assemblers
description: Workers who operate industrial equipment, vehicles, production lines, and assembly systems.

title: Elementary occupations
description: Entry-level and manual-support roles involving cleaning, laboring, picking, carrying, delivery, and other routine physical tasks.
